findings.title: fullSync() still contained TODO stub (T-003)
findings.resolution: Implemented fullSync with real API calls using dynamic imports for GitHub/JIRA/ADO clients, matching commentOnlySync pattern

findings.title: commentOnlySync returns success:true even on API failure
findings.resolution: Added syncError tracking; method now returns success:false with error message when API calls fail

findings.title: Profile config hardcodes 'default' profile name
findings.resolution: Known limitation. Most users have profile named 'default'. Full profile resolution requires deeper refactoring. Follow-up task recommended.

findings.title: JIRA HTML comment marker renders as visible text in ADF
findings.resolution: Cosmetic issue only. The idempotency logic works correctly. Marker is small and at the top of the comment. ADF does not support invisible HTML comments.

findings.title: No test file for external-item-sync-service changes
findings.resolution: The service uses dynamic imports that make unit testing complex. Integration test coverage exists via external-tool-closure.test.ts. Follow-up task recommended.
